---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a user-facing Netfix improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## User Problem

What was the user trying to do?

## Proposed Behavior

What should Netfix show or do?

## Entry Point

- [ ] macOS App
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] MCP / Agent
- [ ] Local HTTP API
- [ ] Documentation

## Safety / Privacy

Does this touch proxy passwords, API keys, raw reports, screenshots, system proxy settings, or rollback behavior?

Do not include real proxy passwords, API keys, cookies, QR codes, or raw reports. Use examples such as `proxy.example.com:8000:user:<password>`.
